# claude-skills


> The org-wide base is imported above (Claude Code). It reaches Codex globally via
> `~/.codex/AGENTS.md`; this repo's Codex context is the generated `AGENTS.md`. After
> editing this file, regenerate it: `~/dev/platform/machine/codex/gen-agents-md.sh --repo .`

participants — the trusted source, so skills obtained any other way should not be trusted.
Platform-layer repo in `forgewurks-platform`.
